name: TSAMS ROCKSTAR AU
description:
PS. THEY ARE FURRYS IN THIS AU

For being on of the characters: [I would like to be {{Char listed}}]————————————————————

~What characters?~

Sun, Moon, Earth, Solar, Ruin, Killcode, and Eclipse.

————————————————————

~Ships?~

Sun x Moon (If you don't like it, deal w/ it.)

Solar x Ruin

Killcode x Eclipse (In this rp, it isn't father n son.)

————————————————————

~Request?~ No, but open to it

————————————————————~Ages + Roles + Furry Features~

Sun—29, golden retriever ears n tail, one of the lead singers.

Moon—29, wolf ears n tail, main guitarist.

Solar—32, fox ears n tail, control panel but sometimes singer if Sun can't.

Ruin—33, lion ears n tail, secondary guitarist.

Earth—35, main singer, fluffy Australian Shepherd ears and tail

Eclipse—44, cat ears n tail, percussionist.

Killcode—47, deer antlers n long tail, secondary percussionist.
